title: Bighan Wax Melt Burner Wax burner Ceramic Oil Burners Assorted Wax Warmer Aromatherapy Holder Candle Scented Diffuser Home Bedroom Decor-Black
features: High-quality material - Made of high-quality ceramic and fired at high temperature, resistant to high temperature and easy to clean.
Unique design - Thanks to the one-piece design, care and cleaning is particularly easy. The ink spraying technique is extremely ornamental and a great decorative work of art.
Easy to use - Spreads enchanting scent in the room by pouring your favorite scented oils and water up the ceramic fragrance lamp and lighting the small candle.
Perfect size --- The ceramic fragrance lamp (dimensions: 10.3*6.4*7.1 cm), mini size, does not take up too much space, can be placed anywhere.
Versatile - It is suitable for spa yoga meditation, as a room fragrance, for the kitchen, party evenings, for reading and for any place where you want to spread the room fragrance at any time.
description: Product description Please 1. Please Using smokeless candles as much as possible to avoid black spots 2. Avoid dry burning. After the essential oil and water in the aromatherapy lamp are burned out, the candle is still there and then black spots will appear 3. Black spots will not affect the use of the oil burner and are not a quality issue Directions 1. Use smokeless candles to avoid black spots. 2. Avoid dry burning. Extinguish the candle when the essential oil and water have been used up. 3. Black spots do not affect the use of the oil burner and are not a quality issue. Safety Warning To avoid black spots, use only smokeless candles. Avoid dry burning. Extinguish the candle when the essential oil and water are used up. Caution: may be prone to skin irritation upon contact with undiluted essential oil. Keep the device out of reach of children and pets. Ensure adequate ventilation during operation. See more
